messages.subject: [R-SIG-Win] Funny compilation error for R-devel (89301+)
messages.body_plain:
Hello, Tomas.

I thought I'd ask here before sending to the full R-devel. I am trying
to build a very recent version of R (89301) on two platforms, both
WIndows 11 using Rtools45. On my home desktop it compiles without an
issue and passes make-check all.

On my work laptop, however, I get the error pasted below when it is
trying to build the manuals. I updated MikTex before running. I tried
to trace line 127 in the Makefile, but I didn;t understand what that
had to do with anything, unless I was looking in the wrong place.

Any thoughts?

Thank you,

Avi

ERROR:
